name: A Fancy Curry Powder
recipeIngredient: 1 cinnamon stick, 3 inches/thin, broken into pieces
Hot peppers, toasted and dried (to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. About 20 pods of cardamom—crack with a cleaver to release seeds.
2. Preheat oven to 225 degrees Fahrenheit. In a small pan, combine fenugreek, cardamom, coriander, cumin, and mustard seeds, cloves, and broken cinnamon stick. Bake for 15 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally. Let cool.
3. In a bowl, mix the toasted spices with mace, nutmeg, Cayenne pepper, turmeric, and dried hot peppers. Place in a spice mill and grind to a powder. Store in an airtight container. Makes approximately 1/2 cup of curry powder.
